summary: Good soundboard‑matrix recording with a tinny patched intro, but a strong two‑set show highlighted by Stranger, Franklin’s and a ripping Minglewood
review: The source is essentially an SBD that uses audience patches for the first two numbers; those patches are described as thin and high‑pitched, while the rest of the board feed sounds smooth and clear. Musically the concert is praised as solid from start to finish – a fun Stranger opener, fiery Franklin’s, a ripping Minglewood, energetic China>Rider and a lively Truckin → Smokestack sequence, with many other songs noted as well‑played. Overall reviewers are enthusiastic despite the minor recording hiccup.

ai_rating.rationale: Most detailed reviews rate the show 4–5 stars and call it a very good performance; the recording is mostly high‑quality SBD with only a short, tinny patch, yielding an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First two tracks are audience‑patched and sound thin/high‑pitched; the remainder is clean SBD with smooth balance. No major dropouts reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong opening with Stranger, followed by a tight first set that builds energy; second set maintains momentum with China>Rider, space improvisation and a high‑energy Truckin’ sequence, ending on solid finishes.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Distortion pedal rips on Minglewood, slide licks trade off with Brent, nice guitar work on Sugaree and strong harmonies.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard solo on Women R praised; Brent also adds slide guitar on Masterpiece.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums come in a little early during the space jam, but overall solid.
